Senevita è il più grande fornitore integrato di servizi per la vecchiaia e impiega circa 4.300 persone. I servizi ambulatoriali e ospedalieri si fondono perfettamente. Mentre le sedi Senevita sono sinonimo di vita assistita indipendente e di assistenza completa, Senevita Casa è l'offerente leader in Svizzera di servizi Spitex privati. Per la Senevita Bernerrose a Zollikofen cerchiamo subito o su appuntamento uno specialista sanitario al 60-100% per il nostro reparto di demenza. 
• I tuoi compiti Contribuirai a garantire che i residenti godano di assistenza e supporto professionali e individuali su base giornaliera. Ti assumerai la responsabilità quotidiana del dipartimento. Sarai coinvolto nelle misure preventive, diagnostiche e terapeutiche. Effettuerai la documentazione assistenziale in modo completo e indipendente. Questo è ciò che porti con la tua formazione come specialista della salute. Esperienza nel rapporto con le persone Demenza, preferibilmente con esperienza psichiatrica Sei motivato e ti piace mettere a frutto le tue forti capacità professionali e sociali nella vita di tutti i giorni Ti piace lavorare con le persone anziane e sei impegnato nei diversi compiti Buona conoscenza orale e scritta del tedesco (B2) Ti offriamo una sfida diversificata nella più grande casa di riposo e di cura del Gruppo Senevita L'opportunità di sviluppare e progettare ulteriormente un giovane centro per pensionati Ampia offerta di formazione continua della Senevita Academy può essere frequentata gratuitamente Pasti scontati nel ristorante interno Retribuzione Abbonamento a metà prezzo e altri sconti 5 settimane di ferie, dai 50 anni 6 settimane e dai 60 anni 7 settimane Infrastruttura tipo hotel con ampie sale comuni Indennizzo adeguato per demenza Ti piace questa posizione? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura online. In caso di domande gli specialisti elencati di seguito saranno lieti di aiutarvi telefonicamente. Compiti Contribuisci a garantire che gli ospiti ricevano quotidianamente assistenza e sostegno professionale e individuale. Ti assumi la responsabilità quotidiana nel dipartimento. Partecipate a misure preventive, diagnostiche e terapeutiche. Esegui la documentazione assistenziale in modo completo e indipendente. 
• Requisiti Formazione come specialista in sanità. Esperienza nel trattare con persone affette da demenza, preferibilmente con esperienza psichiatrica. Sei motivato e ti piace usare le tue forti capacità tecniche e sociali nella vita di tutti i giorni. Ti piace avere a che fare con le persone anziane e ti impegni nei diversi compiti. Buone capacità verbali e conoscenza scritta della lingua tedesca (B2) 
• Offriamo una sfida diversificata nella casa di riposo e di cura più grande del gruppo Senevita L'opportunità di sviluppare e progettare ulteriormente un giovane centro per anziani Possibilità di frequentare gratuitamente corsi di perfezionamento presso la Senevita Academy Pasti scontati nel ristorante interno Retribuzione Abbonamento metà prezzo e altri sconti 5 settimane di ferie, da 50 anni 6 settimane e da 60 anni 7 settimane Infrastruttura di tipo alberghiero con ampie sale comuni Indennità adeguata per demenza
descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old age services and employs around 4,300 people. Outpatient and inpatient services merge seamlessly. While the Senevita locations stand for independent assisted living and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is Switzerland's leading provider of private Spitex services. For the Senevita Bernerrose in Zollikofen, we are looking for a health specialist 60-100% for our dementia department immediately or by appointment. 
• Your tasks You will help ensure that the residents enjoy professional and individual care and support on a daily basis. You will take on day-to-day responsibility in the department. You will be involved in preventive, diagnostic and therapeutic measures. You will carry out the care documentation completely and independently. This is what you bring with your training as a health specialist. Experience in dealing with people Dementia, preferably with psychiatric experience You are motivated and like to use your strong professional and social skills in everyday life You enjoy working with older people and are committed to the diverse tasks Good oral and written knowledge of German (B2) 
• We offer you a diverse challenge in the Senevita Group's largest retirement and nursing home The opportunity to further develop and design a young retirement center Extensive continuing education offerings from the Senevita Academy can be attended free of charge Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Remuneration Half-fare subscription and other discounts 5 weeks of vacation, from 50 years 6 weeks and from 60 years 7 weeks Hotel-like infrastructure with spacious common rooms Appropriate dementia compensation Does this position appeal to you? We look forward to receiving your online application. If you have any questions, the specialists listed below will be happy to help you by phone. Tasks You contribute to ensuring that the residents enjoy professional and individual care and support on a daily basis. You take on day-to-day responsibility in the department. You participate in preventative, diagnostic and therapeutic measures. You carry out the care documentation completely and independently. 
• Requirements Training as a specialist in health. Experience in dealing with people with dementia, preferably with psychiatric experience. You are motivated and enjoy using your strong technical and social skills in everyday life. You enjoy dealing with older people and are committed to the diverse tasks. Good verbal skills and written knowledge of German (B2) 
• We offer a diverse challenge in the Senevita Group's largest retirement and nursing home The opportunity to further develop and design a young retirement center Extensive further training courses at the Senevita Academy can be attended free of charge Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Remuneration Half-fare subscription and other discounts 5 weeks of vacation, from 50 years 6 weeks and from 60 years 7 weeks Hotel-like infrastructure with spacious common rooms Appropriate Dementia compensation
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Senevita est le plus grand prestataire intégré de services aux personnes âgées et emploie environ 4 300 personnes. Les services ambulatoires et hospitaliers fusionnent de manière transparente. Alors que les sites Senevita sont synonymes de vie autonome et de soins complets, Senevita Casa est le principal fournisseur suisse de services Spitex privés. Pour le Senevita Bernerrose à Zollikofen, nous recherchons immédiatement ou sur rendez-vous un spécialiste de la santé à 60-100% pour notre service démence. 
• Vos missions Vous contribuerez à ce que les résidents bénéficient d'un accompagnement et d'un accompagnement professionnels et individuels au quotidien. Vous assumerez des responsabilités quotidiennes au sein du département. Vous participerez aux mesures préventives, diagnostiques et thérapeutiques. Vous réaliserez la documentation de soins de manière complète et indépendante. C'est ce que vous apportez avec votre formation de spécialiste de la santé. Expérience dans le contact avec les personnes Démence, de préférence avec une expérience psychiatrique Vous êtes motivé et aimez utiliser vos solides compétences professionnelles et sociales dans la vie quotidienne Vous aimez travailler avec des personnes âgées et êtes engagé dans diverses tâches Bonne connaissance orale et écrite de l'allemand (B2) Nous vous proposons un défi diversifié dans la plus grande maison de retraite et de soins du groupe Senevita La possibilité de développer et de concevoir une maison de retraite pour jeunes Les nombreuses offres de formation continue de l'Académie Senevita peuvent être suivies gratuitement Repas à prix réduit dans le restaurant de l'établissement Rémunération Abonnement demi-tarif et autres réductions 5 semaines de vacances, à partir de 50 ans 6 semaines et à partir de 60 ans 7 semaines Infrastructure de type hôtelier avec des salles communes spacieuses Indemnisation appropriée de la démence Ce poste vous séduit ? Nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature en ligne. Si vous avez des questions, les spécialistes répertoriés ci-dessous se feront un plaisir de vous aider par téléphone. Tâches Vous contribuez à ce que les résidents bénéficient d'un accompagnement et d'un accompagnement professionnels et individuels au quotidien. Vous assumez des responsabilités quotidiennes au sein du département. Vous participez aux mesures préventives, diagnostiques et thérapeutiques. Vous effectuez la documentation de soins de manière complète et indépendante. 
• Exigences Formation de spécialiste en santé. Expérience dans la prise en charge de personnes atteintes de démence, de préférence avec une expérience psychiatrique. Vous êtes motivé et aimez mettre à profit vos solides compétences techniques et sociales au quotidien. Vous aimez travailler avec des personnes âgées et êtes engagé dans la diversité des tâches. Bonnes compétences verbales et connaissance écrite de l'allemand (B2) 
• Nous proposons un défi diversifié dans la plus grande maison de retraite et de repos du groupe Senevita La possibilité de développer et de concevoir un centre pour jeunes retraités Des cours de formation continue approfondis à l'Académie Senevita peuvent être suivis gratuitement Des repas à prix réduits dans le restaurant de l'établissement Rémunération Abonnement demi-tarif et autres réductions 5 semaines de vacances, à partir de 50 ans 6 semaines et à partir de 60 ans 7 semaines Infrastructure de type hôtelier avec des salles communes spacieuses Démence appropriée indemnisation

jobs.description:
Senevita ist die grösste integrierte Anbieterin von Dienstleistungen im Alter und beschäftigt rund 4'000 Mitarbeitende. Ambulante und stationäre Angebote gehen nahtlos ineinander über. Während die Senevita Standorte für selbstständiges betreutes Wohnen und umfassende Pflege stehen, ist Senevita Casa die schweizweit führende Anbieterin privater Spitex-Leistungen.

Für die  Güpf in Wohlen AG  suchen wir per sofort oder nach Vereinbarung eine achtsame und teamorientierte Person als Fachfrau/-mann Gesundheit als Hauptberufsbildner/in 80 -100%
 Deine 
• Aufgaben
 Du bist als Hauptberufsbildner/in für die Ausbildung der FaGe- und AGS-Lernenden zuständig und bekommst dafür entsprechend  administrative Zeit (Bürotage)
 In unseren Betrieb bringst du dein Fachwissen und deine Pflege-Erfahrung ein
 Du zeigst dich mitverantwortlich für einen reibungslosen Ablauf, eine qualitativ hochstehende Pflege und Betreuung unserer Bewohnenden sowie einen wertschätzenden Umgang mit den Teamkolleginnen und -kollegen
 Die Tagesverantwortung zu übernehmen und die regelmässige Zusammenarbeit mit den Ärzten siehst du als Herausforderung
 Das zeitnahe und korrekte Dokumentieren und Planen (careCoach) ist dir ein Anliegen
 Das bringst du mit
 Ausbildung als Fachfrau/-mann Gesundheit sowie Berufserfahrung
 Kursausweis als Berufsbildner/in, mit entsprechender Erfahrung
 Du bist engagiert und motiviert im Pflegeberuf und gibst dein Wissen gerne weiter
 Eine empathische Begleitung der Bewohnenden ist für dich ebenso selbstverständlich wie eine effektive Arbeitsorganisation und eine wertschätzende Zusammenarbeit im Team
 Deine positive Art trägt aktiv zu einer Betriebskultur bei, in der sich Bewohnende wohl fühlen
 
• Wir bieten dir
 Gemeinsam mit den anderen Berufsbildnerin bist du für die Ausbildung der FaGe- und AGS-Lernenden verantwortlichAttraktives Weiterbildungsangebot der Senevita Akademie, welches zur laufenden Weiterentwicklung inspiriert
 kostenlose Zwischenverpflegung (Mineral, Kaffee, Früchte etc.)
 Vergünstigte Verpflegung in der hauseigenen Gastronomie
 Verschiedene Vergünstigungen (Parkplatz, Halbtax-Abo, Zusatzversicherungen, Fitness, Apotheke usw.)
 Gute Sozialleistungen und mind. 5 Wochen Ferien (ab 50 Jahren 6 Wochen, ab 60 Jahren 7 Wochen) 
 Unser Commitment: Du als Mensch bist uns wichtig!

descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old age services and employs around 4,000 people. Outpatient and inpatient services merge seamlessly. While the Senevita locations stand for independent assisted living and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is Switzerland's leading provider of private Spitex services. For Güpf in Wohlen AG, we are looking for a mindful and team-oriented person immediately or by appointment as a health specialist as a main vocational trainer 80 -100% 
• Your tasks As a main vocational trainer you are responsible for the training of the FaGe and AGS learners and are given the appropriate administrative time (office days) You will bring your specialist knowledge and nursing experience to our company. You will be jointly responsible for a smooth process, high-quality care and support for our Residents and an appreciative interaction with your team colleagues You see taking on day-to-day responsibility and regular collaboration with the doctors as a challenge Prompt and correct documentation and planning (careCoach) is important to you This is what you bring with you Training as a specialist Health and professional experience Course certificate as a vocational trainer, with appropriate experience You are committed and motivated in the nursing profession and are happy to pass on your knowledge Empathic support for the residents is for you just as natural as effective work organization and appreciative teamwork Your positive manner actively contributes to a company culture in which residents feel comfortable 
• We offer you Together with the other vocational trainers, you are responsible for the training of the FaGe and AGS learners Attractive further training offers from the Senevita Academy, which inspire ongoing development Free snacks (minerals, coffee, fruits, etc.) Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Various discounts (parking, Half-fare subscription, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Good social benefits and at least. 5 weeks of vacation (from 50 years 6 weeks, from 60 years 7 weeks) Our commitment: You as a person are important to us! Interested? Does this position appeal to you? An enthusiastic and open team as well as warm residents look forward to seeing you! Please send us your online application. For further information, please contact: Tasks As a main professional trainer, you are responsible for the training of FaGe and AGS learners and are given appropriate administrative time (office days) for this. You will bring your specialist knowledge and nursing experience to our company. You will be jointly responsible for a smooth process, high-quality care and support for our residents, as well as an appreciative interaction with your team colleagues. You will be able to take on day-to-day responsibility and work regularly with the doctors as a challenge Prompt and correct documentation and planning (careCoach) is important to you 
• Requirements Training as a specialist Health and professional experience Course certificate as a vocational trainer, with appropriate experience You are committed and motivated in the nursing profession and are happy to pass on your knowledge Empathetic support for residents is just as natural to you as effective work organization and appreciative teamwork Your positive nature actively contributes to a company culture in which residents feel comfortable 
• We offer together with the others As a vocational trainer, you are responsible for the training of FaGe and AGS learners. Attractive further training offers from the Senevita Academy, which inspire ongoing development. Free snacks (minerals, coffee, fruits, etc.) Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant. Various discounts (parking space, half-fare subscription, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Good social benefits and at least 5 weeks of vacation (from 50 years 6 weeks, from 60 years 7 weeks) Our commitment: You as a person are important to us!

jobs.description:
Senevita ist die grösste integrierte Anbieterin von Dienstleistungen im Alter und beschäftigt rund 4'300 Mitarbeitende. Ambulante und stationäre Angebote gehen nahtlos ineinander über. Während die Senevita Standorte für selbstständiges betreutes Wohnen und umfassende Pflege stehen, ist Senevita Casa die schweizweit führende Anbieterin privater Spitex-Leistungen. Für die Senevita Bernerrose in Zollikofen suchen wir per sofort oder nach Vereinbarung eine/n Fachfrau/-mann Gesundheit 50-100% 
 Deine 
• Aufgaben
 Du trägst dazu bei, dass die Bewohnenden täglich eine professionelle und individuelle Pflege und Betreuung geniessen
 Übernahme der Tagesverantwortung auf der Abteilung
 Du wirkst bei präventiven, diagnostischen und therapeutischen Massnahmen mit
 Du führst die Pflegedokumentation lückenlos und selbstständig
 Du begleitest unsere Lernenden während ihrer Ausbildung 
 Das bringst du mit

 Du bist motiviert und bringst deine ausgeprägten Fach- und Sozialkompetenzen gerne im Alltag ein
 Du hast Freude am Umgang mit älteren Menschen und engagierst dich für die vielseitigen 
• Aufgaben
 Gute mündliche und schriftliche Deutschkenntnisse (B2)
 Abgeschlossener Berufsbildnerkurs von Vorteil, oder Bereitschaft, diesen zu absolvieren
 
• Wir bieten dir
 Eine vielseitige Herausforderung im grössten Alters- und Pflegeheim der Senevita-Gruppe
 Die Chance, ein junges Alterszentrum weiter aufzubauen und zu gestalten
 Umfangreiches Weiterbildungsangebot der Senevita Akademie kann kostenlos besucht werden
 Vergünstigte Verpflegung in der hauseigenen Gastronomie
 Vergütung Halbtax-Abo und weitere Vergünstigungen
 5 Wochen Ferien, ab 50 Jahren 6 Wochen und ab 60 Jahren 7 Wochen
 Hotelähnliche Infrastruktur mit grosszügigen Gemeinschaftsräumen

descriptionByLocale.it:
Senevita è il più grande fornitore integrato di servizi per la vecchiaia e impiega circa 4.300 persone. I servizi ambulatoriali e ospedalieri si fondono perfettamente. Mentre le sedi Senevita sono sinonimo di vita assistita indipendente e di assistenza completa, Senevita Casa è l'offerente leader in Svizzera di servizi Spitex privati. Per Senevita Bernerrose a Zollikofen cerchiamo uno specialista della salute al 50-100% immediatamente o su appuntamento. 
• I tuoi compiti Contribuirai a garantire che i residenti godano di assistenza e supporto professionali e individuali su base giornaliera. Ti assumerai la responsabilità quotidiana del dipartimento. Sarai coinvolto nelle misure preventive, diagnostiche e terapeutiche. Conserverai la documentazione assistenziale in modo completo e autonomo. Accompagnerai i nostri studenti durante la loro formazione. Questo è ciò che porti con te Formazione come specialista della salute Sei motivato e desideri mettere a frutto le tue forti capacità tecniche e sociali nella vita di tutti i giorni Ti piace lavorare con le persone anziane e sei impegnato nei diversi compiti Buona conoscenza orale e scritta della lingua tedesca (B2) Il corso di formazione professionale completato è un vantaggio o la volontà di completarlo Ti offriamo una sfida diversificata nella più grande casa di riposo e di cura del Gruppo Senevita L'opportunità di continuare a costruire e progettare un centro per pensionati per giovani Ampie offerte di perfezionamento della Senevita Academy Può essere visitato per gratis Pasti scontati nel ristorante interno Retribuzione Abbonamento metà prezzo e altri sconti 5 settimane di ferie, 6 settimane per chi ha 50 anni e più e 7 settimane per chi ha 60 anni e più Infrastruttura tipo hotel con ampi spazi comuni Ti piace questa posizione? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura online. In caso di domande gli specialisti elencati di seguito saranno lieti di aiutarvi telefonicamente. Compiti Contribuisci a garantire che gli ospiti ricevano quotidianamente assistenza e sostegno professionale e individuale. Ti assumi la responsabilità quotidiana nel dipartimento. Siete coinvolti in misure preventive, diagnostiche e terapeutiche. Conserva la documentazione assistenziale in modo completo e indipendente. Accompagni i nostri studenti durante la loro formazione. 
• Requisiti Formazione come specialista sanitario Sei motivato e ti piace utilizzare le tue forti capacità tecniche e sociali nella vita di tutti i giorni. Ti piace avere a che fare con le persone anziane e ti impegni con loro nei diversi compiti Buona conoscenza orale e scritta della lingua tedesca (B2) Il corso di formazione professionale completato è un vantaggio o la volontà di completarlo 
• Offriamo una sfida diversificata nella più grande casa di riposo e di cura del gruppo Senevita L'opportunità di costruire e progettare ulteriormente un centro per giovani pensionati È possibile frequentare gratuitamente corsi di perfezionamento presso la Senevita Academy Pasti scontati nel ristorante interno Retribuzione Abbonamento a metà prezzo e altri sconti 5 settimane di ferie, da 50 anni 6 settimane e oltre 60 anni 7 settimane Infrastruttura di tipo alberghiero con ampi spazi comuni
descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old age services and employs around 4,300 people. Outpatient and inpatient services merge seamlessly. While the Senevita locations stand for independent assisted living and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is Switzerland's leading provider of private Spitex services. For the Senevita Bernerrose in Zollikofen we are looking for a health specialist 50-100% immediately or by appointment. 
• Your tasks You will help ensure that the residents enjoy professional and individual care and support on a daily basis. You will take on day-to-day responsibility in the department. You will be involved in preventive, diagnostic and therapeutic measures. You will keep the care documentation completely and independently. You will accompany our learners during their training. This is what you bring with you Training as a health specialist You are motivated and like to use your strong technical and social skills in everyday life You enjoy working with older people and are committed to the diverse tasks Good oral and written knowledge of German (B2) Completed vocational training course is an advantage, or willingness to complete it 
• We offer you a diverse challenge in the Senevita Group's largest retirement and nursing home The opportunity to continue to build and design a young retirement center Extensive further training offers from the Senevita Academy Can be visited for free Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Remuneration Half-fare subscription and other discounts 5 weeks of vacation, 6 weeks for those aged 50 and over and 7 weeks for those aged 60 and over Hotel-like infrastructure with spacious common areas Does this position appeal to you? We look forward to receiving your online application. If you have any questions, the specialists listed below will be happy to help you by phone. Tasks You contribute to ensuring that the residents enjoy professional and individual care and support on a daily basis. You take on day-to-day responsibility in the department. You are involved in preventive, diagnostic and therapeutic measures. You keep the care documentation completely and independently. You accompany our learners during their training. 
• Requirements Training as a health specialist You are motivated and like to use your strong technical and social skills in everyday life. You enjoy dealing with older people and are committed to them the diverse tasks Good oral and written knowledge of German (B2) Completed vocational training course is an advantage, or willingness to complete it 
• We offer a diverse challenge in the Senevita Group's largest retirement and nursing home The opportunity to further build and design a young retirement center Extensive further training courses at the Senevita Academy can be attended free of charge Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Remuneration Half-fare subscription and other discounts 5 weeks of vacation, from 50 years 6 weeks and up 60 years 7 weeks Hotel-like infrastructure with spacious common areas

 Vergünstigungen (SBB-Halbtax, Tanken, Zusatzversicherungen, Fitness, Apotheke usw.) 
 Gute Sozialleistungen und mind. 5 Wochen Ferien (ab 50 Jahren 6 Wochen, ab 60 Jahren 7 Wochen)

descriptionByLocale.it:
Senevita è il più grande fornitore integrato di servizi per la vecchiaia e impiega circa 4.300 persone. I servizi ambulatoriali e ospedalieri si fondono perfettamente. Mentre le sedi Senevita sono sinonimo di vita assistita indipendente e di assistenza completa, Senevita Casa è l'offerente leader in Svizzera di servizi Spitex privati. 
• Cerchiamo per Senevita Limmatfeld a Dietikon una persona attenta e orientata al team come specialista della salute all'80-100% immediatamente o su appuntamento. 
• I tuoi compiti Non siamo perfetti, ma vogliamo migliorare continuamente. Aiutaci a modellare il nostro ambiente di apprendimento! Mentre fai quello che fai, attingi alla tua esperienza professionale, la combini con un'interazione rispettosa e ti stupisci della gioia che tiri fuori dalla vita. Così tanta esperienza di vita sotto lo stesso tetto è incredibile! Unisciti a noi nell'essere orgogliosi di farne parte e di dare il meglio ai nostri residenti ogni giorno. Sostenete gli studenti nel loro percorso professionale Fungete da modello Questo è ciò che portate con la vostra qualifica di specialista sanitario EFZ Orgoglioso del vostro lavoro importante, significativo e vario L'esperienza in un reparto per demenza è obbligatoria Piacere di far parte di una squadra e "più vicino alle persone" Curiosità per il vostro nuovo ambiente di lavoro Vi offriamo un piano di lavoro che può fare a meno dei servizi condivisi Interessante formazione continua offerta dalla Senevita Academy, che ispira lo sviluppo continuo Un ambiente in cui la formazione professionale è GRANDE e porta una ventata di aria fresca in casa Bevande gratuite e pasti scontati - preparati con cura dal nostro team di ristorazione Riduzioni (abbonamento metà-prezzo FFS, rifornimento carburante, assicurazioni complementari, fitness, farmacia, ecc.) Buone prestazioni sociali e almeno 5 settimane di ferie (6 settimane per i 50 anni e più, 7 settimane per i 60 anni e più) Attività/eventi interessanti che tengono in movimento dipendenti e residenti Ottima accessibilità (collegamento immediato all'autostrada, posizione direttamente accanto alla stazione ferroviaria di Studen) Il nostro impegno: voi come persona sono importanti per noi! Interessato? Ti attira questa posizione? Un team entusiasta e aperto, nonché residenti affettuosi, non vedono l'ora di vederti! Inviaci la tua candidatura online. • Offriamo un piano di lavoro che può fare a meno dei servizi condivisi Interessante formazione continua offerta dalla Senevita Academy, che ispira il perfezionamento continuo Un ambiente in cui la formazione professionale è MOLTO importante e una boccata d'aria fresca nel... descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old age services and employs around 4,300 people. Outpatient and inpatient services merge seamlessly. While the Senevita locations stand for independent assisted living and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is Switzerland's leading provider of private Spitex services. For Senevita Limmatfeld in Dietikon, we are looking for a mindful and team-oriented person as a health specialist 80-100% immediately or by appointment. 
• Your tasks We are not perfect, but we want to continually improve. Help us shape our learning environment! As you do what you do, you draw on your professional experience, combine it with respectful interaction, and marvel at the joy in life you bring out. So much life experience under one roof is incredible! Join us in being proud to be a part of it and to give the best to our residents every day. You support the learners on their career path You act as a role model This is what you bring with your qualification as a health specialist EFZ Proud of your important, meaningful and versatile job Experience in a dementia ward is mandatory Enjoyment of being part of a team and "closer to people" Curiosity about your new working environment 
• We offer you a work plan that can do without shared services Attractive further training offered by the Senevita Academy, which inspires ongoing development An environment where vocational training is LARGE and brings a breath of fresh air into the house Free drinks and discounted meals - heartily prepared by our catering team Discounts (SBB half-fare travelcard, refueling, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Good social benefits and at least 5 weeks of vacation (from 50 years 6 weeks, from 60 years 7 weeks) Exciting activities/events that keep employees and residents moving Very good accessibility (immediate motorway connection, location right next to the train station Studen) Our commitment: You as a person are important to us! Interested? Does this position appeal to you? An enthusiastic and open team as well as warm residents look forward to seeing you! Please send us your online application. For further information, please contact: Tasks We are not perfect, but we want to continually improve. Help us shape our learning environment! As you do what you do, you draw on your professional experience, combine it with respectful interaction, and marvel at the joy in life you bring out. So much life experience under one roof is incredible! Join us in being proud to be a part of it and to give the best to our residents every day. You support the learners on their career path You act as a role model 
• Requirements Qualification as a health specialist EFZ Proud of your important, meaningful and versatile job Experience in a dementia ward is mandatory Enjoyment of being part of a team and "closer to people" Curiosity about your new working environment 
• We offer a work plan that can do without shared services Attractive further training offered by the Senevita Academy, which inspires ongoing further development An environment where vocational training is HIGHLY important and a breath of fresh air in the... The house provides free drinks and reduced meals - heartily prepared by our catering team. Discounts (SBB half-fare tax, refueling, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Good social benefits and at least 5 weeks of vacation (6 weeks from 50 years, 7 weeks from 60 years) Exciting activities/events that keep employees and residents moving Very good accessibility (immediate motorway connection, location right next to Studen train station) Our Commitment: You as a person are important to us!
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Senevita est le plus grand prestataire intégré de services aux personnes âgées et emploie environ 4 300 personnes. Les services ambulatoires et hospitaliers fusionnent de manière transparente. Alors que les sites Senevita sont synonymes de vie autonome et de soins complets, Senevita Casa est le principal fournisseur suisse de services Spitex privés. Pour Senevita Limmatfeld à Dietikon, nous recherchons une personne attentive et orientée vers l'équipe en tant que spécialiste de la santé à 80-100% immédiatement ou sur rendez-vous. 
• Vos tâches Nous ne sommes pas parfaits, mais nous souhaitons nous améliorer continuellement. Aidez-nous à façonner notre environnement d’apprentissage ! En faisant ce que vous faites, vous vous appuyez sur votre expérience professionnelle, la combinez avec une interaction respectueuse et vous vous émerveillez de la joie de vivre que vous faites ressortir. Tant d’expériences de vie sous un même toit, c’est incroyable ! Rejoignez-nous pour être fier d'en faire partie et de donner le meilleur à nos résidents chaque jour. Vous accompagnez les apprenants dans leur cheminement de carrière Vous êtes un modèle C'est ce que vous apportez avec votre qualification de spécialiste de la santé EFZ Fier de votre travail important, significatif et polyvalent Une expérience dans un service de démence est obligatoire Plaisir de faire partie d'une équipe et "plus proche des gens" Curiosité pour votre nouvel environnement de travail Nous vous proposons un plan de travail qui peut se passer de services partagés Une formation continue attractive proposée par l'Académie Senevita, qui inspire le développement continu Un environnement où la formation professionnelle est LARGE et apporte une bouffée d'air frais dans la maison Boissons gratuites et repas à prix réduit - préparés avec cœur par notre équipe de restauration Réductions (abonnement demi-tarif CFF, ravitaillement en carburant, assurance complémentaire, fitness, pharmacie, etc.) Bonnes prestations sociales et au moins 5 semaines de vacances (à partir de 50 ans 6 semaines, à partir de 60 ans 7 semaines) Des activités/manifestations passionnantes qui font bouger les collaborateurs et les résidents Très bonne accessibilité (connexion autoroutière immédiate, emplacement juste à côté de la gare de Studen) Notre engagement : En tant que personne, vous êtes important pour nous ! Intéressé? Ce poste vous séduit ? Une équipe enthousiaste et ouverte ainsi que des résidents chaleureux vous attendent avec impatience ! Merci de nous envoyer votre candidature en ligne. Pour plus d'informations, veuillez contacter : Tâches Nous ne sommes pas parfaits, mais nous souhaitons nous améliorer continuellement. Aidez-nous à façonner notre environnement d’apprentissage ! En faisant ce que vous faites, vous vous appuyez sur votre expérience professionnelle, la combinez avec une interaction respectueuse et vous vous émerveillez de la joie de vivre que vous faites ressortir. Tant d’expériences de vie sous un même toit, c’est incroyable ! Rejoignez-nous pour être fier d'en faire partie et de donner le meilleur à nos résidents chaque jour. Vous accompagnez les apprenants dans leur cheminement de carrière Vous êtes un modèle 
• Exigences Qualification en tant que spécialiste de la santé EFZ Fier de votre travail important, significatif et polyvalent L'expérience dans un service de démence est obligatoire Plaisir de faire partie d'une équipe et "plus proche des gens" Curiosité à l'égard de votre nouvel environnement de travail 
• Nous proposons un plan de travail qui peut se passer de services partagés Une formation continue attrayante proposée par l'Académie Senevita, qui inspire un développement continu Un environnement où la formation professionnelle est TRÈS importante et une bouffée d'air frais dans... La maison offre gratuitement boissons et repas à prix réduits - préparés chaleureusement par notre équipe de restauration. Réductions (taxe demi-tarif CFF, ravitaillement en carburant, assurance complémentaire, fitness, pharmacie, etc.) De bonnes prestations sociales et au moins 5 semaines de vacances (6 semaines à partir de 50 ans, 7 semaines à partir de 60 ans) Des activités/événements passionnants qui font bouger les collaborateurs et les résidents Très bonne accessibilité (connexion autoroutière immédiate, emplacement juste à côté de la gare de Studen) Notre engagement : en tant que personne, vous êtes important pour nous !

jobs.description:
Senevita ist die grösste integrierte Anbieterin von Dienstleistungen im Alter und beschäftigt rund 4'000 Mitarbeitende. Ambulante und stationäre Angebote gehen nahtlos ineinander über. Während die Senevita Standorte für selbstständiges betreutes Wohnen und umfassende Pflege stehen, ist Senevita Casa die schweizweit führende Anbieterin privater Spitex-Leistungen.

Für die Senevita Limmatfeld in Dietikon und Senevita Vivimus  suchen wir per sofort oder nach Vereinbarung eine/n Fachfrau/-mann Betreuung 40-60% 
 
• Ihre Aufgaben
 Sie gestalten den Alltag, das Aktivierungsangebot sowie die soziokulturellen Anlässe mit und führen die Aktivitäten durch
 Sie unterstützen und begleiten unsere Bewohnenden auch bei Ausflügen
 Sie leisten Ihren kreativen Beitrag bei festlichen bzw. themenbezogenen, internen Anlässen
 Sie arbeiten mit allen Bereichen im Haus interdisziplinär zusammen
 Das bringen Sie mit
 Ausbildung als Fachfrau/-mann Betreuung 
 Berufserfahrung in der Langzeitpflege und Freude an der Arbeit mit betagten Menschen
 Sehr gute mündliche und schriftliche Deutschkenntnisse, MS-Office Kenntnisse von Vorteil
 Teamfähigkeit, grosse Belastbarkeit, Flexibilität, Selbstständigkeit und Kreativität sowie eine Prise Humor
 Sie sind ein Organisationstalent und interessiert, den Alltag effizient und spannend zu gestalten
 
• Wir bieten Ihnen
 Vielseitige Aufgabe mit Gestaltungsmöglichkeiten in Zusammenarbeit mit unserem jungen, dynamischen, motivierten Team
 Moderne Infrastruktur und heller, gut ausgerüsteter Arbeitsplatz (nahe am Bahnhof Dietikon gelegen)
 Umfangreiches Weiterbildungsangebot der Senevita Akademie
 Einzigartige Kultur und diverse grosszügige Mitarbeiteranlässe
 Vergünstigte Verpflegung in der hauseigenen Gastronomie
 Verschiedene Vergünstigungen (SBB-Halbtax, Zusatzversicherungen, Fitness, Apotheke usw.)
 Mind. 5 Wochen Ferien (ab 50 Jahren 6 bzw. ab 60 Jahren 7 Wochen)
 
Spricht Sie diese Stelle an? Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Onlinebewerbung.
Bei Fragen steht Ihnen die nachfolgend aufgeführte Fachperson gerne telefonisch zur Verfügung.

descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old age services and employs around 4,000 people. Outpatient and inpatient services merge seamlessly. While the Senevita locations stand for independent assisted living and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is Switzerland's leading provider of private Spitex services. For the Senevita Limmatfeld in Dietikon and Senevita Vivimus we are looking for a specialist immediately or by appointment. Care 40-60% 
• Your tasks You will help shape everyday life, the activation offer and the socio-cultural events and carry out the activities. You will also support and accompany our residents on excursions. You will make your creative contribution to festive or. topic-related, internal events You work with all areas in the company in an interdisciplinary manner This is what you bring with training as a specialist Care Professional experience in long-term care and enjoyment of working with elderly people Very good oral and written German skills, MS Office knowledge is an advantage Ability to work in a team, great resilience, flexibility, independence and creativity as well as a pinch of humor You have organizational talent and are interested in making everyday life efficient and exciting 
• We offer you a varied task with creative opportunities in collaboration with our young, dynamic, motivated team Modern infrastructure and bright, well-equipped workplace (located close to the Dietikon train station) Extensive further training offerings from the Senevita Academy Unique culture and various generous employee events Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Various discounts (SBB half-fare card, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Min. 5 weeks of vacation (from 50 years 6 or from 60 years 7 weeks) Does this position appeal to you? We look forward to receiving your online application. If you have any questions, the specialist listed below will be happy to assist you by telephone. Tasks You will help shape everyday life, the activation offer and the socio-cultural events and carry out the activities. You will also support and accompany our residents on excursions. You will make your creative contribution to festive or. topic-related, internal events You work interdisciplinarily with all areas in the company 
• Requirements Training as a specialist Care Professional experience in long-term care and enjoy working with elderly people Very good oral and written German skills, MS Office knowledge is an advantage Ability to work in a team, great resilience, flexibility, independence and creativity as well as a pinch of humor You have a talent for organization and are interested in making everyday life efficient and exciting 
• We offer a varied task with creative opportunities in collaboration with our young, dynamic, motivated modern team Infrastructure and bright, well-equipped workplace (located close to Dietikon train station) Extensive further training offering from the Senevita Academy Unique culture and various generous employee events Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Various discounts (SBB half-fare travel card, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Min. 5 weeks holiday (from 50 years 6 or from 60 years 7 weeks)

jobs.description:
Senevita ist die grösste integrierte Anbieterin von Dienstleistungen im Alter und beschäftigt rund 4'000 Mitarbeitende. Ambulante und stationäre Angebote gehen nahtlos ineinander über. Während die Senevita Standorte für selbstständiges betreutes Wohnen und umfassende Pflege stehen, ist Senevita Casa die schweizweit führende Anbieterin privater Spitex-Leistungen.

Für die Senevita in Burgdorf suchen wir per 01. Januar 2026 eine achtsame und teamorientierte Person als  Fachfrau/ Fachmann Gesundheit FaGe EFZ 80- 100 % - nur Spätdienst 
 Deine 
• Aufgaben
 Du stellst eine individuelle, ganzheitliche und bewohnerorientierte Pflege und Betreuung sicher, die die Lebensqualität der Bewohnenden in den Mittelpunkt stellt
 Du unterstützt die Bewohnenden aktiv dabei, ihre vorhandenen Fähigkeiten zu erhalten und zu fördern und beziehst sie in die Entscheidungen bezüglich ihrer Pflege ein
 Du erkennst frühzeitig Veränderungen im Gesundheitszustand der Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner, dokumentierst diese präzise und leitest entsprechende Massnahmen ein
 Du pflegst einen empathischen und transparenten Austausch mit Angehörigen und Bezugspersonen und stehst als kompetente Ansprechperson zur Verfügung
 Du beteiligst dich aktiv an der Weiterentwicklung unserer Pflegequalität und bringst deine Ideen zur Optimierung von Prozessen ein
 Das bringst du mit
 Eine abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Fachfrau-/mann Gesundheit EFZ oder eine gleichwertige, in der Schweiz anerkannte Ausbildung
 Idealerweise bringst du bereits mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in der Langzeitpflege mit - auch Wiedereinsteiger/-innen sind herzlich Willkommen
 Du hast ein grosses Herz für ältere Menschen und legst Wert auf eine wertschätzende, empathische und bewohnerzentrierte Pflege
 Du arbeitest gerne im Team, bist hilfsbereit und respektvoll im Umgang mit Kolleginnen und Kollegen und trägst aktiv zu einem positiven Arbeitsklima bei
 Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse sind für die Kommunikation mit unseren Bewohnern und im Team unerlässlich
 
• Wir bieten dir
 Die Möglichkeit, sehr selbständig zu arbeiten und sich mit einem erfahrenen Team auszutauschen
 Umgangreiches und kostenloses Weiterbildungsangebot auf dem Senevita Campus und der Senevita Akademie, welches zur laufenden Weiterentwicklung inspiriert
 Vergünstigte Verpflegung in der hauseigenen Gastronomie
 Attraktive Senevita-Benefits (SBB-Halbtax, Tanken, Zusatzversicherungen, Fitness, Apotheke etc.)
 Regelmässige Teamanlässe und gemeinsame Erlebnisse, die das Miteinander stärken
Grosszügige Ferienregelung
 Unser Statement "Näher am Menschen" zählt für unsere Mitarbeitenden genauso wie für unsere Bewohnenden

Senevita è il più grande fornitore integrato di servizi di vecchiaia e impiega circa 4'000 persone. Estetica e stazionaria offre unione senza soluzione di continuità. Mentre i siti Senevita sono sinonimo di cura indipendente e cura completa, Senevita Casa è il fornitore leader di servizi privati Spitex in tutta la Svizzera. Per la Senevita a Burgdorf stiamo cercando 01. Gennaio 2026 una persona ottava e orientata al team come specialista FaGe EFZ 80- 100% - solo servizio tardivo Garantirai cure e cure individuali, olistiche e orientate alla stanza che si concentrano sulla qualità della vita degli abitanti Stai attivamente sostenendo e promuovendo le competenze esistenti e li riferisci alle decisioni relative alla loro cura. Riconosce i cambiamenti nello stato di salute dei residenti in una fase iniziale, documenta questi precisi e guida le misure appropriate. Hai un grande cuore per le persone anziane e apprezzi un apprezzamento, una cura empatica e spazio-centrica Siete felici di lavorare nel team, sono utili e rispettosi nel trattare con i colleghi e contribuire attivamente ad un ambiente di lavoro positivo con la conoscenza molto buona tedesca sono essenziali per la comunicazione con i nostri residenti e nel team Vi offriamo l'opportunità di lavorare molto indipendentemente e di scambiarsi con un team esperto. Eventi di squadra regolari e esperienze condivise che rafforzano la cooperazione La nostra affermazione "Näher am Mensch" conta per i nostri dipendenti e per i nostri residenti interessati? E' casa tua? Un team entusiasta e aperto così come i residenti caldi vi aspettano! Inviateci la vostra domanda online. Per ulteriori informazioni, si prega di contattare: Garantisci cure e cure individuali, olistiche e orientate alla stanza che si concentrano sulla qualità della vita degli abitanti State attivamente sostenendo e promuovendo le capacità esistenti e fate riferimento alle decisioni relative alla vostra cura. Riconosci i cambiamenti nella salute dei residenti in una fase iniziale, documenta queste misure precise e guida corrispondenti. Siete anche consapevoli di uno scambio empirico e trasparente con parenti e riferimenti. Hai un grande cuore per le persone anziane e apprezzi un apprezzamento, una cura empatica e spazio-centrica Ti piace lavorare nel team, sono utili e rispettosi nel trattare con i colleghi e contribuire attivamente ad un ambiente di lavoro positivo con la conoscenza molto buona tedesca sono essenziali per la comunicazione con i nostri residenti e nel team

descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old age services and employs around 4,000 people. Outpatient and inpatient services merge seamlessly. While the Senevita locations stand for independent assisted living and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is Switzerland's leading provider of private Spitex services. We are looking for the Senevita in Burgdorf from January 1st. January 2026 a mindful and team-oriented person as a health specialist FaGe EFZ 80-100% - late shift only 
• Your tasks You will ensure individual, holistic and resident-oriented care and support that focuses on the quality of life of the residents You actively support the residents in maintaining and promoting their existing skills and include them in the decisions regarding their care You recognize changes in the residents' health at an early stage and document them precisely and initiate appropriate measures You maintain an empathetic and transparent exchange with relatives and caregivers and are available as a competent contact person You actively participate in the further development of our care quality and contribute your ideas for optimizing processes 
• What you bring with you Completed training as a health specialist EFZ or an equivalent training recognized in Switzerland Ideally, you already have several years of professional experience in long-term care - also Those returning to work are warmly welcome. You have a big heart for older people and value appreciative, empathetic and resident-centered care. You enjoy working in a team, are helpful and respectful when dealing with colleagues and actively contribute to a positive working atmosphere. Very good knowledge of German is essential for communication with our residents and in the team. 
• We offer you the opportunity to work very independently and exchange ideas with an experienced team Senevita Campus and the Senevita Academy, which inspires ongoing development Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Attractive Senevita benefits (SBB half-fare card, refueling, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Regular team events and shared experiences that strengthen cooperation Generous holiday regulations Our statement "Closer to people" counts for our employees as well as our residents Interested? Does this position appeal to you? An enthusiastic and open team as well as warm residents look forward to seeing you! Please send us your online application. For further information, please contact: Tasks You ensure individual, holistic and resident-oriented care and support that focuses on the quality of life of the residents You actively support the residents in maintaining and promoting their existing abilities and include them in the decisions regarding their care You recognize changes in the health status of the residents at an early stage, document them precisely and initiate appropriate measures You maintain an empathetic and transparent exchange with relatives and caregivers You are available as a competent contact person You actively participate in the further development of our care quality and contribute your ideas for optimizing processes 
• Requirements Completed training as a health specialist (EFZ) or equivalent training recognized in Switzerland Ideally, you already have several years of professional experience in long-term care - those returning to work are also welcome You have a big heart for older people and value appreciative, empathetic and resident-centered care You enjoy working in a team, are helpful and respectful when dealing with colleagues and actively contribute to a positive working atmosphere. Very good knowledge of German is essential for communication with our residents and in the team. 
• We offer the opportunity to work very independently and exchange ideas with an experienced team Senevita benefits (SBB half-fare card, gas, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Regular team events and shared experiences that strengthen cooperation Generous vacation policy Our statement “Closer to people” counts for our employees as well as our residents

jobs.title: Fachfrau-/mann Gesundheit EFZ 50%

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste en santé EFZ 50%

jobs.description:
Senevita ist die grösste integrierte Anbieterin von Dienstleistungen im Alter und beschäftigt rund 4'000 Mitarbeitende. Ambulante und stationäre Angebote gehen nahtlos ineinander über. Während die Senevita Standorte für selbstständiges betreutes Wohnen und umfassende Pflege stehen, ist Senevita Casa die schweizweit führende Anbieterin privater Spitex-Leistungen. Für die Senevita Dammweg in der Lorraine in Bern suchen wir per 1. März 2026 oder nach Vereinbarung eine fröhliche und teamorientierte Person als  Fachfrau / Fachmann Gesundheit EFZ 50%
  Deine 
• Aufgaben
 Wir sind nicht perfekt, werden aber laufend besser: Du hilfst mit, eine hochstehende Pflege sicherzustellen und unser spannendes und lernwilliges Umfeld mitzuprägen.
 Du übernimmst verschiedene Dienste (Früh- und Spätdienst).
 Du sorgst mit deinen Kompetenzen und respektvollem Umgang für Sicherheit bei unseren Bewohnenden.
 Du führst die Pflegedokumentation selbständig und lückenlos.
 Du bist motiviert, Teil eines schlagkräftigen Teams zu sein und stolz darauf, tagtäglich das Beste für unsere Bewohnenden zu geben.
 Das bringst du mit
 Du hast Freude am Umgang mit älteren Menschen und engagierst dich gerne für deren Wohlbefinden.
 Du verfügst über einen Abschluss als Fachfrau/Fachmann Gesundheit EFZ.
 Du bist selbständig, kompetent und ein positiver Mensch.
 Du bist stolz auf deinen wichtigen, sinnvollen und vielseitigen Beruf.
 
• Wir bieten dir
 Ein offenes, fröhliches Team, das 
• Aufgaben und Herausforderungen gerne gemeinsam anpackt.
 Ein umfangreiches Weiterbildungsangebot der Senevita Akademie, welches zur laufenden Weiterentwicklung inspiriert.
 Einzigartige Kultur und diverse grosszügige Mitarbeiteranlässe
 Vergünstige Verpflegung in der hauseigenen Gastronomie
 Verschiedene Vergünstigungen (SBB-Halbtax, Tanken, Zusatzversicherungen, Fitness, Apotheke usw.)
 Mindestens 5 Wochen Ferien (ab 50 Jahren 6 bzw. ab 60 Jahren 7 Wochen)
 Sehr zentraler Arbeitsplatz und hervorragende Erreichbarkeit (Busstation gleich vor der Tür, 5 Min. vom Bahnhof Bern entfernt).
 Unser Commitment: Du als Mensch bist uns wichtig!
 
Spricht dich diese Stelle an? Wir freuen uns auf deine Onlinebewerbung.Bei Fragen stehen dir die nachfolgend aufgeführten Fachpersonen gerne telefonisch zur Verfügung.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Senevita è il più grande fornitore integrato di servizi per la vecchiaia e impiega circa 4.000 persone. I servizi ambulatoriali e ospedalieri si fondono perfettamente. Mentre le sedi Senevita sono sinonimo di vita assistita indipendente e di assistenza completa, Senevita Casa è l'offerente leader in Svizzera di servizi Spitex privati. 
• Cerchiamo per Senevita Dammweg in Lorena a Berna una persona allegra e orientata al team come specialista della salute / specialista EFZ 50% dal 1 marzo 2026 o su appuntamento. 
• I tuoi compiti Non siamo perfetti, ma miglioriamo costantemente: contribuirai a garantire cure di alta qualità e contribuirai a modellare il nostro ambiente entusiasmante e di apprendimento. Assumi vari compiti (turni anticipati e tardivi). Garantisci la sicurezza dei nostri residenti con le tue capacità e un'interazione rispettosa. Conservi la documentazione assistenziale in modo indipendente e senza lacune. Sei motivato a far parte di una squadra potente e orgoglioso di fare il meglio per i nostri residenti ogni giorno. Cosa porti con te: ti piace lavorare con le persone anziane e ti piace essere coinvolto nel loro benessere. Possiedi una qualifica di specialista sanitario (EFZ). Sei indipendente, competente e una persona positiva. Sei orgoglioso del tuo lavoro importante, significativo e vario. Ti offriamo un team aperto e felice che ama affrontare insieme compiti e sfide. Una vasta gamma di corsi di perfezionamento della Senevita Academy, che ispira lo sviluppo continuo. Cultura unica e vari eventi generosi per i dipendenti Pasti scontati nel ristorante interno Diversi sconti (abbonamento metà-prezzo FFS, gas, assicurazioni complementari, fitness, farmacia, ecc.) Almeno 5 settimane di ferie (6 settimane a partire da 50 anni o 7 settimane a partire da 60 anni) Posto di lavoro molto centrale e ottima accessibilità (stazione degli autobus proprio davanti alla porta, a 5 minuti dalla stazione ferroviaria di Berna). Il nostro impegno: per noi tu sei importante come persona! Ti attira questa posizione? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura online. In caso di domande gli specialisti elencati di seguito saranno lieti di aiutarvi telefonicamente. descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old-age services and employs around 4'000 people. Outpatient and stationary offers merge seamlessly. While the Senevita sites stand for independent caring and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is the leading provider of private Spitex services throughout Switzerland. For the Senevita Dammweg in the Lorraine in Bern we are looking for 1. March 2026 or by agreement a happy and team-oriented person as a specialist / expert Health EFZ 50% 
• Your tasks We are not perfect, but are always better: you help to ensure a high level of care and to express our exciting and learning environment. You take various services (breakfast and late service). You talk about your skills and respectful handling of security among our residents. You carry the care documentation independently and without gaps. You are motivated to be part of a powerful team and proud to be the best for our residents every day. This brings you joy in dealing with older people and you like to be close to their well-being. You have a degree as a specialist in health EFZ. You are independent, competent and a positive person. You are proud of your important, meaningful and versatile profession. 
• We offer you an open, cheerful team who likes to tackle tasks and challenges together. An extensive training offer of the Senevita Academy, which is inspired by ongoing further development. Unique culture and various generous staff occasions Beneficiary catering in the in-house gastronomy Various discounts (SBB tax, fuelling, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy etc.) At least 5 weeks holiday (from 50 years 6 or from 60 years 7 weeks) Very central workplace and excellent accessibility (bus station just outside the door, 5 minutes from Bern train station). jobs.description:
Senevita ist die grösste integrierte Anbieterin von Dienstleistungen im Alter und beschäftigt rund 4'300 Mitarbeitende. Ambulante und stationäre Angebote gehen nahtlos ineinander über. Während die Senevita Standorte für selbstständiges betreutes Wohnen und umfassende Pflege stehen, ist Senevita Casa die schweizweit führende Anbieterin privater Spitex-Leistungen.

Für die Senevita Gais in Aarau  suchen wir per 1. Juli 2026 oder nach Vereinbarung eine achtsame und teamorientierte Person als  Fachfrau / Fachmann Gesundheit im Nachtdienst (60%) 
 Deine 
• Aufgaben
 Du stellst eine individuelle, ganzheitliche und bewohnerorientierte Pflege und Betreuung sicher, die die Lebensqualität der Bewohnenden in den Mittelpunkt stellt
 Du unterstützt die Bewohnenden aktiv dabei, ihre vorhandenen Fähigkeiten zu erhalten und zu fördern und beziehst sie in die Entscheidungen bezüglich ihrer Pflege ein
 Du erkennst frühzeitig Veränderungen im Gesundheitszustand der Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner, dokumentierst diese präzise und leitest entsprechende Massnahmen ein
 Du pflegst einen empathischen und transparenten Austausch mit Angehörigen und Bezugspersonen und stehst als kompetente Ansprechperson zur Verfügung
 Du beteiligst dich aktiv an der Weiterentwicklung unserer Pflegequalität und bringst deine Ideen zur Optimierung von Prozessen ein
 Das bringst du mit
 Abschluss als Fachfrau/Fachmann Gesundheit EFZ
 Bereitschaft für Nachtdienste
 Stolz auf deinen wichtigen, sinnvollen und vielseitigen Beruf
 Neugierde auf dein neues Arbeitsumfeld
 Du hast ein grosses Herz für ältere Menschen und legst Wert auf eine wertschätzende, empathische und bewohnerzentrierte Pflege
 Du arbeitest gerne im Team, bist hilfsbereit und respektvoll im Umgang mit Kolleginnen und Kollegen und trägst aktiv zu einem positiven Arbeitsklima bei
 Gute Deutschkenntnisse 
 
• Wir bieten dir
 Die Möglichkeit, sehr selbständig zu arbeiten und sich mit einem erfahrenen Team auszutauschen
 Umgangreiches und kostenloses Weiterbildungsangebot auf dem Senevita Campus und der Senevita Akademie, welches zur laufenden Weiterentwicklung inspiriert
 Vergünstigte Verpflegung in der hauseigenen Gastronomie
 Attraktive Senevita-Benefits (SBB-Halbtax, Tanken, Zusatzversicherungen, Fitness, Apotheke etc.)
 Regelmässige Teamanlässe und gemeinsame Erlebnisse, die das Miteinander stärken
Grosszügige Ferienregelung

descriptionByLocale.it:
Senevita è il più grande fornitore integrato di servizi per la vecchiaia e impiega circa 4.300 persone. I servizi ambulatoriali e ospedalieri si fondono perfettamente. Mentre le sedi Senevita sono sinonimo di vita assistita indipendente e di assistenza completa, Senevita Casa è l'offerente leader in Svizzera di servizi Spitex privati. 
• Cerchiamo il Senevita Gais ad Aarau dal 1° gennaio. Luglio 2026 o su appuntamento una persona attenta e orientata al team come specialista sanitario di turno notturno (60%) I vostri compiti Garantirete un'assistenza individuale, olistica e orientata ai residenti e un sostegno che si concentri sulla qualità della vita dei residenti Sostenete attivamente i residenti nel mantenimento e nella promozione delle loro competenze esistenti e li includete nelle decisioni relative alla loro cura Riconoscete tempestivamente i cambiamenti nello stato di salute dei residenti, li documentate con precisione e avviate misure adeguate Mantenete uno scambio empatico e trasparente con parenti e operatori sanitari e siete disponibile come persona di contatto competente partecipi attivamente all'ulteriore sviluppo della nostra qualità dell'assistenza e contribuisci con le tue idee per ottimizzare i processi questo è ciò che porti con te con la qualifica di specialista sanitario EFZ disponibilità per i turni di notte orgoglioso del tuo lavoro importante, significativo e versatile curioso del tuo nuovo ambiente di lavoro hai un grande cuore per gli anziani e apprezzi un'assistenza riconoscente, empatica e incentrata sul residente ti piace lavorare in squadra, sei disponibile e rispettoso nei rapporti con i colleghi e contribuisci attivamente a un'atmosfera di lavoro positiva Buona conoscenza della lingua tedesca Vi offriamo la possibilità di lavorare in piena autonomia e di scambiare idee con un team esperto Un'offerta di perfezionamento amichevole e gratuita nel Campus Senevita e nella Senevita Academy, che ispira lo sviluppo continuo Pasti scontati nel ristorante interno Attraenti vantaggi Senevita (abbonamento metà-prezzo FFS, rifornimento carburante, assicurazioni complementari, fitness, farmacia, ecc.) Eventi di squadra regolari ed esperienze condivise che rafforzano la cooperazione Generose norme per le vacanze La nostra dichiarazione "Più vicini alle persone" conta sia per i nostri dipendenti che per i nostri residenti Interessato? Ti attira questa posizione? Un team entusiasta e aperto, nonché residenti affettuosi, non vedono l'ora di vederti! Inviaci la tua candidatura online. Per ulteriori informazioni rivolgersi a: Compiti Garantire un'assistenza e un sostegno individuale, olistico e orientato al residente, orientato alla qualità della vita dei residenti Sostenete attivamente i residenti nel mantenimento e nella promozione delle loro capacità esistenti e li includete nelle decisioni relative alla loro cura Riconoscete tempestivamente i cambiamenti nello stato di salute dei residenti, li documentate con precisione e avviate misure adeguate Mantenete uno scambio empatico e trasparente con i parenti e gli operatori sanitari siete a disposizione come interlocutore competente Partecipate attivamente allo sviluppo della nostra qualità dell'assistenza e apportate le vostre idee per ottimizzare i processi 
• Requisiti Qualifica di specialista sanitario EFZ Disponibilità per i turni di notte Orgoglioso del tuo lavoro importante, significativo e versatile Curioso del tuo nuovo ambiente di lavoro Hai un grande cuore per le persone anziane e apprezzi l'assistenza riconoscente, empatica e incentrata sul residente Ti piace lavorare in squadra, sei disponibile e rispettoso nei rapporti con i colleghi Colleghi e contribuisci attivamente a un'atmosfera di lavoro positiva Buona conoscenza del tedesco 
• Offriamo l'opportunità di lavorare in modo molto indipendente e scambiare idee con un team esperto Un programma di formazione amichevole e gratuito su il Campus Senevita e la Senevita Academy, che ispirano lo sviluppo continuo Pasti scontati nel ristorante interno Interessanti vantaggi Senevita (abbonamento metà-prezzo FFS, rifornimento carburante, assicurazioni complementari, fitness, farmacia, ecc.) Eventi di squadra regolari ed esperienze condivise che rafforzano la solidarietà Regolamenti generosi per le vacanze La nostra dichiarazione "Più vicini alle persone" conta sia per i nostri collaboratori che per i nostri residenti
descriptionByLocale.en:
Senevita is the largest integrated provider of old age services and employs around 4,300 people. Outpatient and inpatient services merge seamlessly. While the Senevita locations stand for independent assisted living and comprehensive care, Senevita Casa is Switzerland's leading provider of private Spitex services. We are looking for the Senevita Gais in Aarau from January 1st. July 2026 or by appointment a mindful and team-oriented person as a health specialist on night duty (60%) 
• Your tasks You will ensure individual, holistic and resident-oriented care and support that focuses on the quality of life of the residents You actively support the residents in maintaining and promoting their existing skills and include them in the decisions regarding their care You recognize changes in the health status of the residents at an early stage, document them precisely and initiate appropriate measures You maintain an empathetic and transparent exchange with relatives and caregivers and are available as a competent contact person You actively participate in the further development of our quality of care and contribute your ideas for optimizing processes This is what you bring with you with a qualification as a health specialist EFZ Willingness for night shifts Proud of your important, meaningful and versatile job Curious about your new working environment You have a big heart for older people and value an appreciative, empathetic and resident-centered care You enjoy working in a team, are helpful and respectful when dealing with colleagues and actively contribute to a positive working atmosphere Good knowledge of German 
• We offer you the opportunity to work very independently and exchange ideas with an experienced team A friendly and free further training offer on the Senevita Campus and the Senevita Academy, which inspires ongoing development Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Attractive Senevita benefits (SBB half-fare card, refueling, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Regular team events and shared experiences that strengthen cooperation Generous holiday regulations Our statement "Closer to people" counts for our employees as well as our residents Interested? Does this position appeal to you? An enthusiastic and open team as well as warm residents look forward to seeing you! Please send us your online application. For further information, please contact: Tasks You ensure individual, holistic and resident-oriented care and support that focuses on the quality of life of the residents You actively support the residents in maintaining and promoting their existing abilities and include them in the decisions regarding their care You recognize changes in the health status of the residents at an early stage, document them precisely and initiate appropriate measures You maintain an empathetic and transparent exchange with relatives and caregivers are available as a competent contact person You actively participate in the further development of our quality of care and contribute your ideas for optimizing processes 
• Requirements Qualification as a health specialist EFZ Readiness for night shifts Proud of your important, meaningful and versatile job Curious about your new working environment You have a big heart for older people and value appreciative, empathetic and resident-centered care You enjoy working in a team, are helpful and respectful in your dealings with colleagues Colleagues and actively contribute to a positive working atmosphere Good knowledge of German 
• We offer the opportunity to work very independently and exchange ideas with an experienced team A friendly and free training program on the Senevita Campus and the Senevita Academy, which inspires ongoing development Discounted meals in the in-house restaurant Attractive Senevita benefits (SBB Half-Fare travelcard, refueling, additional insurance, fitness, pharmacy, etc.) Regular Team events and shared experiences that strengthen togetherness Generous holiday regulations Our statement “Closer to people” counts for our employees as well as our residents
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Senevita est le plus grand prestataire intégré de services aux personnes âgées et emploie environ 4 300 personnes. Les services ambulatoires et hospitaliers fusionnent de manière transparente. Alors que les sites Senevita sont synonymes de vie autonome et de soins complets, Senevita Casa est le principal fournisseur suisse de services Spitex privés. Nous recherchons le Senevita Gais à Aarau à partir du 1er janvier. Juillet 2026 ou sur rendez-vous, une personne attentive et orientée vers l'équipe en tant que spécialiste de la santé de nuit (60%) 
• Vos tâches Vous assurez des soins et un soutien individuels, holistiques et orientés vers le résident, axés sur la qualité de vie des résidents. Vous soutenez activement les résidents dans le maintien et la promotion de leurs compétences existantes et les incluez dans les décisions concernant leurs soins. Vous reconnaissez à un stade précoce les changements dans l'état de santé des résidents, les documentez avec précision et initiez les mesures appropriées. Vous entretenez un échange empathique et transparent avec les proches et les soignants et êtes disponible comme un interlocuteur compétent Vous participez activement au développement de notre qualité de soins et apportez vos idées pour optimiser les processus C'est ce que vous apportez avec votre qualification de spécialiste de la santé EFZ Volonté pour les équipes de nuit Fier de votre travail important, significatif et polyvalent Curieux de votre nouvel environnement de travail Vous avez un grand cœur pour les personnes âgées et valorisez les soins avec reconnaissance, empathie et centrés sur le résident Vous aimez travailler en équipe, êtes serviable et respectueux dans vos relations avec vos collègues et contribuez activement à une atmosphère de travail positive Bonnes connaissances d'allemand Nous vous offrons la possibilité de travailler de manière très indépendante et d'échanger des idées avec une équipe expérimentée. Une offre de formation continue conviviale et gratuite sur le campus Senevita et à la Senevita Academy, qui inspire le développement continu. Des repas à prix réduits dans le restaurant de l'entreprise Des avantages Senevita attrayants (abonnement demi-tarif CFF, ravitaillement en carburant, assurance complémentaire, fitness, pharmacie, etc.) Des événements d'équipe réguliers et des expériences partagées qui renforcent la coopération Un règlement de vacances généreux Notre devise "Plus proche des gens" compte pour nos collaborateurs comme pour nos résidents. Intéressé ? Ce poste vous séduit ? Une équipe enthousiaste et ouverte ainsi que des résidents chaleureux vous attendent avec impatience ! Merci de nous envoyer votre candidature en ligne. Pour de plus amples informations, veuillez contacter : Tâches Vous assurez des soins et un soutien individuels, holistiques et axés sur le résident, axés sur la qualité de vie des résidents. Vous soutenez activement les résidents dans le maintien et la promotion de leurs capacités existantes et les incluez dans les décisions concernant leurs soins. Vous reconnaissez à un stade précoce les changements dans l'état de santé des résidents, les documentez avec précision et initiez les mesures appropriées. Vous entretenez un échange empathique et transparent avec les proches et les soignants. Vous êtes disponible en tant qu'interlocuteur compétent. Vous participez activement au développement de notre qualité de soins et apportez vos idées pour optimisation des processus 
• Exigences Qualification en tant que spécialiste de la santé EFZ Préparation aux équipes de nuit Fier de votre travail important, significatif et polyvalent Curieux de votre nouvel environnement de travail Vous avez un grand cœur pour les personnes âgées et valorisez les soins valorisés, empathiques et centrés sur le résident Vous aimez travailler en équipe, êtes serviable et respectueux dans vos relations avec vos collègues Collègues et contribuez activement à une atmosphère de travail positive Bonne connaissance de l'allemand 
• Nous offrons la possibilité de travailler de manière très indépendante et d'échanger des idées avec une équipe expérimentée Un programme de formation convivial et gratuit sur le Senevita Campus et la Senevita Academy, source d'inspiration pour le développement continu Repas à prix réduits dans le restaurant de l'établissement Avantages Senevita attractifs (abonnement demi-tarif CFF, ravitaillement en carburant, assurance complémentaire, fitness, pharmacie, etc.) Des événements d'équipe réguliers et des expériences partagées qui renforcent la convivialité Un règlement de vacances généreux Notre devise «Plus proche des gens» compte pour nos collaborateurs comme pour nos résidents

 Du unterstützt die Bewohnenden aktiv dabei, ihre vorhandenen Fähigkeiten zu erhalten und zu fördern und beziehst sie in die Entscheidungen bezüglich ihrer Pflege ein
 Du erkennst frühzeitig Veränderungen im Gesundheitszustand der Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner, dokumentierst diese präzise und leitest entsprechende Massnahmen ein
 Du pflegst einen empathischen und transparenten Austausch mit Angehörigen und Bezugspersonen und stehst als kompetente Ansprechperson zur Verfügung
 Du beteiligst dich aktiv an der Weiterentwicklung unserer Pflegequalität und bringst deine Ideen zur Optimierung von Prozessen ein

Anforderungen
Eine abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Fachfrau-/mann Gesundheit EFZ oder eine gleichwertige, in der Schweiz anerkannte Ausbildung
 Idealerweise bringst du bereits mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in der Langzeitpflege mit - auch Wiedereinsteiger/-innen sind herzlich Willkommen
 Du hast ein grosses Herz für ältere Menschen und legst Wert auf eine wertschätzende, empathische und bewohnerzentrierte Pflege
 Du arbeitest gerne im Team, bist hilfsbereit und respektvoll im Umgang mit Kolleginnen und Kollegen und trägst aktiv zu einem positiven Arbeitsklima bei
 Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse sind für die Kommunikation mit unseren Bewohnern und im Team unerlässlich

Wir bieten
Die Möglichkeit, sehr selbständig zu arbeiten und sich mit einem erfahrenen Team auszutauschen
 Umgangreiches und kostenloses Weiterbildungsangebot auf dem Senevita Campus und der Senevita Akademie, welches zur laufenden Weiterentwicklung inspiriert
 Vergünstigte Verpflegung in der hauseigenen Gastronomie
 Attraktive Senevita-Benefits (SBB-Halbtax, Tanken, Zusatzversicherungen, Fitness, Apotheke etc.)
 Regelmässige Teamanlässe und gemeinsame Erlebnisse, die das Miteinander stärken
 Grosszügige Ferienregelung
 Unser Statement "Näher am Menschen" zählt für unsere Mitarbeitenden genauso wie für unsere Bewohnenden
